account.totalCapitalHint: Total capital is saved locally for amount conversion only — it will not be included in LLM analysis context.
account.riskPreferenceHint: Affects the LLM's tendency within weight adjustment ranges.

resetOnboardingConfirm.title: Redo onboarding?
resetOnboardingConfirm.description: This will clear local onboarding drafts and make the Dashboard onboarding prompt reappear. Current holdings and decision cards are not affected.

message.resetError: Reset failed, please try again later

preferences.languageHint: After switching language, newly generated analysis reports will use the selected language. Existing reports are unaffected.
preferences.timezoneHint: Timezone selection does not affect push notification windows yet.

channels.loadErrorDesc: Please refresh the page or try again later
channels.pushSchedule: Push schedule: Beijing time 08:30 / 15:30 / next day 06:00, filtered automatically by holdings.

emailForm.defaultHint: Leave blank to send to current account email.

llm.title: Configure Provider
llm.description: Configure your own LLM provider to enable AI interpretation. When not configured, you can choose to use the system default or the rules engine.

callout.systemConsentGiven: Current analysis uses Richman's system default AI provider. You can configure your own provider for better quota and privacy control.
callout.systemNoConsent: System default AI provider is available, but you haven't agreed to use it. Current analysis falls back to the rules engine. Configure your own provider or agree during onboarding to enable AI interpretation.
callout.noSystem: Current analysis uses the rules engine. Configure your own LLM provider to enable AI interpretation.

healthyCard.fallbackToggle: Auto fallback to system default on failure
healthyCard.fallbackHint: When enabled, if your provider fails, holdings data will be sent to Richman's system default AI provider for analysis via encrypted transmission. When disabled, it falls back directly to the rules engine.

deleteConfirm.title: Confirm delete LLM Provider config?
deleteConfirm.description: After deletion, analysis will fall back to system default or rules engine.

fallback.systemAvailable: You have enabled failure fallback: on failure, analysis will automatically use Richman's system default AI provider.
fallback.systemUnavailable: You have enabled failure fallback, but the system default provider is currently unavailable. Analysis will fall back to the rules engine.
fallback.noFallback: You have not enabled failure fallback — analysis will use the rules engine directly.

deleteConfirm.title: Confirm delete LLM Provider config?
deleteConfirm.description: After deletion, analysis will fall back to system default or rules engine.

configForm.baseUrlProtocolRequired: Base URL must start with http:// or https://
configForm.apiKeyEdit: API Key (leave blank to keep unchanged)
configForm.apiKeyOptionalPlaceholder: Optional (Ollama does not require an API key)
configForm.apiKeyOptionalHint: Self-hosted providers like Ollama do not require an API key
configForm.fallback: Auto fallback to system default on failure
configForm.fallbackHint: When enabled, if your provider fails (expired key, quota exceeded, network error), your holdings data will be sent to Richman's system default AI provider for analysis via encrypted transmission. When disabled, it falls back directly to the rules engine.
